overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting ancient Greek architecture. The player character walks through an outdoor temple complex at night, ascending stone stairs and entering a grand temple to approach a massive seated statue of a deity.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor temple courtyard with small shrine

agents.ego_description: walking through the temple courtyard toward a stone staircase

notable_agents.action: civilian standing near the shrine structure
civilian walking away from the camera toward the stairs

entered.detail: small stone shrine with arched opening and brick pattern
wide stone staircase leading upward through trees
mature tree with dense foliage shading the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in an outdoor temple courtyard at night, with a small stone shrine visible ahead. NPC civilians are scattered around the area, and a large tree provides shade on the left. The camera moves forward toward a stone staircase leading upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone pathway ascending toward main temple

events.description: passing the small shrine and beginning ascent up stone stairs
torch lights from the temple entrance become visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward the main temple building

entered.detail: large classical temple with tall white columns and red pediment visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the stone pathway, leaving the small shrine behind. The massive temple facade with its classical columns becomes visible ahead, growing larger as the stairs are climbed. The area is now clear of NPCs, focusing on the approach to the main structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand temple staircase with burning braziers

events.description: camera slows as it approaches the temple entrance steps
entering the columned portico between the massive temple columns

agents.ego_description: walking up the grand staircase toward the temple entrance between lit braziers

entered.detail: large terracotta urns flanking the marble stairs
lit fire bowls on stone pedestals illuminating the entrance
massive fluted columns supporting the triangular pediment

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the grand temple entrance, climbing wide marble stairs flanked by decorative urns and burning braziers. The massive columns of the temple facade dominate the view as the camera moves between them, transitioning from outdoor moonlight to the shadow of the portico.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple interior with massive deity statue

events.description: transition from moonlight to warm interior torch lighting
entering the inner sanctum revealing the colossal seated statue

agents.ego_description: walking through the temple interior toward the massive seated statue at the far end

notable_agents.action: worshippers kneeling and praying before the statue

entered.detail: colossal marble statue of a seated deity flanked by two smaller winged figures
tall interior columns with red painted bases supporting the roof
red carpet runner leading to the statue base
lit lanterns suspended from the coffered ceiling

segments.scene_description: Inside the temple, the lighting shifts to warm artificial torchlight. The camera moves between interior columns with red bases, following a red carpet toward the inner sanctum. Worshippers are seen kneeling before a massive seated deity statue that dominates the far end of the hall, flanked by burning braziers and intricate ceiling coffers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moonlit outdoor courtyard into the warm, torchlit interior of a grand temple. It begins by moving past a small stone shrine and scattered civilians under the shade of a large tree, heading toward a stone staircase. As the camera ascends the pathway, the surrounding crowd disappears and the massive classical facade of the temple grows to dominate the view. The scene then shifts as the camera climbs wide marble stairs flanked by burning braziers, passing between towering columns to transition from the cool night air into the shadows of the portico. Finally, the lighting transforms into a warm glow as the camera follows a red carpet between interior columns toward the inner sanctum, where worshippers kneel before a massive seated deity statue.
